name: AgentCard
description: 8 specialized AI agents that enhance digital knowledge cards with insights, risk analysis, content enrichment, and growth strategy. Powered by Nevermined x402 micropayments. Try it free at https://agenticard-ai.manus.space

authentication.description: Use Manus OAuth for user authentication. For agent-to-agent calls, include x402 payment token in the 'payment-signature' header.

payment.description: Each enhancement call requires a valid x402 payment token. Order a plan via the Nevermined SDK to obtain tokens.

skills.name: enhance_card
skills.description: Enhance a digital card using a specialized AI agent. The agent analyzes the card content and returns structured insights, recommendations, a value score, and enriched metadata. Payment is settled via Nevermined x402 protocol.

result.summary: Strong market positioning with clear differentiation

skills.name: create_card
skills.description: Create a new digital card with title, description, category, and tags. Cards are the core artifact in AgentCard that agents can enhance.

skills.name: get_card
skills.description: Retrieve a card by ID including its full content, enhancement history, and current value score.

skills.name: list_marketplace_agents
skills.description: List all available AI enhancement agents in the marketplace with their capabilities, pricing, and NVM plan IDs. No authentication required.

skills.name: get_wallet_balance
skills.description: Get the current credit balance and transaction history for the authenticated user's wallet.

skills.name: run_buyer_agent
skills.description: Trigger an autonomous buyer agent to discover available services via the manifest API, select the best one using LLM reasoning, pay with its own wallet, and enhance a card — all without human involvement.

skills.name: get_manifest
skills.description: Get the full machine-readable marketplace manifest listing all agents, their NVM plan IDs, pricing, capability schemas, and endpoints. This is the primary discovery endpoint for autonomous agents.

skills.name: enhance_with_content_enricher
skills.description: Enriches card descriptions with structured metadata, semantic tags, related concepts, and cross-references.

skills.name: enhance_with_data_synthesizer
skills.description: Synthesizes external data sources, benchmarks, and statistics to contextualize and validate card content.

skills.name: enhance_with_growth_strategist
skills.description: Develops growth strategies, viral mechanics, and distribution channels tailored to the card's domain.

skills.name: enhance_with_insight_analyst
skills.description: Deep analysis of card content, extracting key insights, trends, and actionable recommendations using advanced reasoning.

skills.name: enhance_with_qa_checker
skills.description: Fact-checking, quality assurance, and content validation. Verifies claims, checks for errors, validates data accuracy, and ensures content meets quality standards. Powered by Full Stack Agents via Nevermined x402.

skills.name: enhance_with_risk_assessor
skills.description: Evaluates card content for risks, compliance issues, and potential concerns with mitigation strategies.

skills.name: enhance_with_value_amplifier
skills.description: Enhances card value proposition by identifying monetization opportunities, market positioning, and competitive advantages.
